'''James Warwick''' (born [[November 17]], [[1940s#1947|1947]]) is an English actor who provided the voice for [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] in several ''[[Star Wars]]'' video games.

==Roles==
{{Mediacat|soundcat=Audio files of James Warwick}}
*[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars: The Phantom Menace'']] – Qui-Gon Jinn
*''[[Star Wars: Episode I Jedi Power Battles]]'' – Qui-Gon Jinn
*''[[Star Wars: Obi-Wan]]'' – Qui-Gon Jinn
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' – Qui-Gon Jinn, Zalor militiaman
